factions.name: Cadurci
factions.blurb: A Gaulish people of the rugged uplands of the interior, known for their ironworking and fine linen.

factions.name: Ruteni
factions.blurb: A Gaulish tribe of the southern highlands, dwelling among the hills and river valleys inland from the coast.

factions.name: Helvii
factions.blurb: A Gaulish people settled along the upper Rhône, at the edge of the great river route into the interior.

factions.name: Gabali
factions.blurb: A Gaulish tribe of the high inland plateaus, herders and miners of the mountain country.

factions.name: Volcae
factions.blurb: A large and widespread Gaulish confederation of the lands west of the Rhône.

factions.name: Allobroges
factions.blurb: A populous people of the Rhône and Isère valleys, settled between the river and the Alpine foothills.

factions.name: Cavares
factions.blurb: A Celto-Ligurian people of the lower Rhône, dwelling along the river's eastern bank.

factions.name: Vocontii
factions.blurb: A Celto-Ligurian people of the pre-Alpine valleys to the east.

factions.name: Saluvii
factions.blurb: A Celto-Ligurian confederation of the coastal hinterland inland from the sea.

factions.name: Veltanii
factions.blurb: A small Celto-Ligurian community of the coastal hinterland.

factions.name: Ligurians
factions.blurb: The hardy hill and coast peoples of the mountainous shore east of the Rhône.

factions.name: Ausci
factions.blurb: An Aquitanian people of the southwestern plains stretching toward the Pyrenees.

factions.name: Convenae
factions.blurb: An Aquitanian people of the Pyrenean foothills in the far southwest.

factions.name: Tarusates
factions.blurb: An Aquitanian people of the wooded lowlands of the southwest.

factions.name: Ilergetae
factions.blurb: An Iberian people of the inland plains south of the Pyrenees.

factions.name: Lacetani
factions.blurb: An Iberian people of the hill country of the northeastern peninsula.

factions.name: Rome
factions.blurb: A rising republic of central Italy, steadily extending its power across the peninsula.

factions.name: Carthage
factions.blurb: The great Punic maritime and trading power of the western Mediterranean, mistress of a far-flung commercial network.

factions.name: Syracuse
factions.blurb: The foremost Greek city of Sicily, a wealthy and influential power of the central Mediterranean.
